Video.summary: Steve discusses mindfulness meditation and how those who practice it reduce their stress, increase their contentment, and achieve more
Video.title: How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor

Image.alt: How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor
How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor
How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor

Video.summary: Meet the contestants and learn the first of Brian’s 5 step House Hacking formula.
Video.title: EP 1 - Location Location Location

Video.summary: Learn why using properties you don’t own can be so lucrative.
Video.title: EP 2 - Other People's Property

Video.summary: The contestants prepare to make a place livable before guests arrive.
Video.title: EP 3 - We Have Company

Video.summary: It’s time to make the property listing live on the site and accept bookings.
Video.title: EP 4 - Flip the Switch

Video.summary: Find out which contestant is named the winner and becomes Brian’s new business partner.
Video.title: EP 5 - The Finale

Video.summary: Day one explores core teachings from A Course in Miracles: releasing ambition, ego, and grandiosity to become a compassionate presence. Rather than fixing or leading, we learn to hold space, trust divine guidance, and allow true healing and spiritual transmission to unfold.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers- Day 1

Video.summary: Day 2 of Teaching the Teachers explores the core teaching that only love is real and fear is illusion. Not a religion, the Course offers a non-dogmatic spiritual path that can complement other teachings and invites surrender to a higher power for true healing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 2

Video.summary: Day Three of Teaching the Teachers reveals that the ego conceals our perfect, God-created Self. We are not our bodies, and life continues beyond birth and death. Thoughts create effects, yet through atonement we can be freed from guilt, fear, and suffering when we choose healing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 3

Video.summary: Day 1 introduces the practice of centering through the breath. When the mind drifts to regret or worry, we gently return—again and again. This meditation teaches concentration, presence, and compassion, reminding us that healing isn’t in never wandering, but in beginning again.
Video.title: Day 1 - Centering

Video.summary: Day 2 invites us to examine the stories we tell about our worth, limits, and lives. By recognizing conditioned habits and outdated coping tools, we reconnect with our power of choice. This lesson reminds us that change is always possible—and that we can meet life with renewed care and curiosity.
Video.title: Day 2 - Beginning Again

Video.summary: Day 3 focuses on meeting anger and fear with compassion rather than resistance. By paying gentle attention to difficult emotions, we learn they are not bad—only painful when they define us. Using the breath as an anchor, we develop a kinder, wiser relationship to our inner experience.
Video.title: Day 3 - Compassion

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Ali. Talks Nelly, The St. Lunatics, Music Career, and St. Louis
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier

Video.summary: Sun exposure increases your risk of skin damage. We break down these common skin issues and what you can do about them.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin

Video.summary: It’s often difficult to talk about mental illness with a child or teenager. We talk to an expert to help guide you through the conversation.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health

Video.summary: Breast cancer researcher and physician talks about the latest therapies used to treat breast cancer and the advances that are bringing hope and healing to millions of people because of clinical trials.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment
Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment
Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment

Video.summary: Today's lesson is on Spirit and how to tune into that space beyond the physical.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 29 Spirit/God Halasana

Video.summary: Day 30 of our challenge is built around Bridge Pose, a simple backbend.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana
Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana
Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana

Video.summary: We’ll use the seated pose Padmasana to explore what it means to be happy, peaceful and spiritually at home in your own skin.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose
Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose
Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose

Video.summary: If your mind feels foggy or unfocused, your food could be the missing piece. Mona unpacks how nutrition impacts your brain, mood, and energy—offering simple shifts to nourish your body and sharpen your mind from the inside out.
Video.title: Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6

Image.alt: Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6
Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6
Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6

Video.summary: In this episode of Rooted in Wellness, I’m joined by Darin Olien who explains the importance of nature and mindfulness practices for revolutionizing our health and happiness.
Video.title: Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle

Image.alt: Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle
Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle
Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle

Video.summary: Why has infertility become so normal? Better yet – why are women the only one’s taking on the burden of infertility? The statistics on the amount of women struggling with PCOS (making them infertile) are only rising and with men being responsible for 50% of infertility, the conversation needs to change.
Video.title: WeNatal: Reversing Infertility and PCOS + How Men Play a Role in Fertility

Image.alt: WeNatal: Reversing Infertility and PCOS + How Men Play a Role in Fertility
WeNatal: Reversing Infertility and PCOS + How Men Play a Role in Fertility
WeNatal: Reversing Infertility and PCOS + How Men Play a Role in Fertility

Video.summary: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about “good fats,” healthy eating, and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving! Info: Udoschoice.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
